task: askr is a multi-agent session management system for Claude Code; prior sessions fixed handover document generation, guard system boundary validation, and companion session lifecycle. This session discovered a critical security vulnerability (live Discord webhook in public GitHub history) and initiated a launch-readiness audit to identify all blockers before public release.
discussion_summary: Previous sessions resolved cross-repo contamination, guard hallucination, and session handoff synchronization. This session pivoted to launch readiness after user expressed commitment to public availability (brew install target). A critical finding emerged: the public GitHub repository contains a plaintext Discord webhook URL in committed history (commit 50eba93 on origin/main), requiring immediate remediation. User requested a comprehensive audit of all launch blockers, test coverage, dependencies, and deployment readiness before public announcement.

accomplishments.what: Fixed 8 hallucination and boundary issues in guard system: cross-repo boundary validation, retry state tracking, guard rule tightening, and decision.jsonl pollution prevention
Fixed companion session opening to wait for Stop hook completion signal instead of watching for stats file deletion
Fixed handover document generation to scope file paths to askr repository only, preventing cross-repo contamination in project state
Discovered critical security vulnerability: live Discord webhook URL exposed in plaintext in public GitHub repository history (commit 50eba93, origin/main)
Initiated comprehensive launch-readiness audit: identified need to assess test coverage, dependencies, documentation, deployment scripts, and all TODO/FIXME markers

in_progress.what: Launch-readiness audit in progress: running test suite validation, TODO/FIXME/XXX marker inventory, dependency verification, and deployment readiness assessment. Audit results pending.

next_actions.action: URGENT: Rotate Discord webhook URL immediately. Remove plaintext webhook from git history using git-filter-branch or BFG Repo-Cleaner, force-push to origin/main, and regenerate webhook in Discord settings.
next_actions.why: Live webhook URL is publicly exposed in GitHub history; any actor can post to askr's Discord channel. This is a critical security vulnerability blocking public release.

next_actions.action: Complete launch-readiness audit: review all TODO/FIXME/XXX markers, test coverage gaps, missing documentation, deployment script validation, and dependency lock files. Produce prioritized blockers list.
next_actions.why: User committed to public release (brew install) and is telling people it will be live in a week. Audit must identify all gaps before announcement.

next_actions.action: Validate test suite passes end-to-end: confirm pytest runs cleanly, all imports resolve, and critical paths (session init, handoff, guard system) are covered.
next_actions.why: Public release requires confidence that core functionality is tested and reproducible.

next_actions.action: Review and finalize Homebrew formula (Formula/*.rb): ensure all dependencies are declared, installation paths are correct, and post-install hooks work on macOS.
next_actions.why: User's public commitment is 'brew install askr'; formula must be production-ready.

next_actions.action: Test companion session handoff at 60% quota threshold to verify new window opens after reply completes without context loss
next_actions.why: Lifecycle fix was committed in prior session; needs validation that the Stop hook signal properly synchronizes session transfer.

next_actions.action: Monitor guard system for false positives after tightening rules; verify that legitimate operations are no longer blocked by inferred constraints
next_actions.why: Guard system was over-blocking based on absence of mention; recent fixes should eliminate hallucination loops but need validation in live operation.

decisions.decision: Absence of a file/directory/pattern in architecture.md does NOT mean it is prohibited; only explicit forbiddance in CLAUDE.md or architecture.md triggers guard blocks
decisions.reason: Guard was over-blocking legitimate operations based on absence of mention; explicit prohibition is required to block

decisions.decision: Cross-repo boundary checks must be enforced in pre_tool_use.py to prevent tool use outside the askr repository
decisions.reason: Multi-agent system must be confined to its own codebase to prevent unintended modifications to external projects

decisions.decision: Retry state must preserve original operation type (read/write/create) across retries to avoid false 'creating' classifications
decisions.reason: Guard system was misclassifying retried operations; operation type must be immutable across retry boundaries

decisions.decision: Public GitHub repository requires all secrets (Discord webhooks, API keys, tokens) to be rotated and removed from history before launch
decisions.reason: Plaintext secrets in public git history are permanently compromised; rotation and history rewrite are mandatory for security

relational_files.why: Handover document generation; prior session fixed scoping to askr repo only
Cross-repo boundary enforcement; prior session fixed 8 hallucination issues
Homebrew installation formula; critical for public release via brew install
Python dependencies; must be validated for public release
Test suite validation required before public announcement

blockers: CRITICAL: Live Discord webhook URL exposed in public GitHub repository history (commit 50eba93, origin/main) — must be rotated and removed from history before any public announcement
Launch-readiness audit incomplete — full inventory of TODO/FIXME/XXX markers, test coverage gaps, and deployment readiness not yet assessed
Homebrew formula validation pending — Formula/*.rb must be tested on macOS before public release
